skills.description: Create Linear tickets or GitHub issues following n8n conventions. Use when the user asks to create a ticket, file a bug, open an issue, or says /create-issue.
Quick reference for n8n patterns. Full docs /AGENTS.md
intents: apply n8n frontend or backend conventions
check n8n testing or build commands

skills.description: Guides users through creating effective Agent Skills. Use when you want to create, write, or author a new skill, or asks about skill structure, best practices, or SKILL.md format.
intents: author skill documentation with proper frontmatter
review or audit skill best practices

skills.description: Fetch and analyze Linear issue with all related context. Use when starting work on a Linear ticket, analyzing issues, or gathering context about a Linear issue.
intents: gather issue details for development work
identify affected n8n node from issue
summarize linear issue with related context

skills.description: Reproduce a bug from a Linear ticket with a failing test. Expects the full ticket context (title, description, comments) to be provided as input.
intents: create test that confirms or denies bug hypothesis
reproduce a bug from a Linear ticket
trace code path to identify root cause
write a failing regression test for a bug

skills.description: Creates GitHub pull requests with properly formatted titles that pass the check-pr-title CI validation. Use when creating PRs, submitting changes for review, or when the user says /pr or asks to create a pull request.
intents: create PR with proper title format
push branch and open draft PR

skills.description: Fetch and display the full transcript from a Loom video URL. Use when the user wants to get or read a Loom transcript.

Product content designer for UI copy. Use when writing, reviewing, or auditing user-facing text: button labels, error messages, tooltips, empty states, modal copy, placeholder text, confirmation dialogs, onboarding flows, or i18n strings. Also use when the user says /copy, /content, or /ux-copy.
intents: audit codebase files for content violations using grep patterns
maintain consistent product terminology across surfaces
review existing UI copy against content guidelines
suggest i18n keys and manage localization strings
write UI copy for buttons, modals, tooltips, errors, and empty states

skills.description: Add OAuth2 credential support to an existing n8n node — creates the credential file, updates the node, adds tests, and keeps the CLI constant in sync. Use when the user says /node-add-oauth.
intents: add OAuth2 support to an n8n node
add authorization code flow to n8n node
create OAuth2 credential for n8n node
integrate third-party OAuth2 with n8n node

skills.description: Keeps implementation and specs in sync. Use when working on a feature that has a spec in .claude/specs/, when the user says /spec, or when starting implementation of a documented feature. Also use when the user asks to verify implementation against a spec or update a spec after changes.
